features: KEEPS SENSITIVE SKIN PROTECTED: Protect your sensitive skin and help to keep it healthy when you shower with Sanex Men Skin Health Sensitive Care Shower Gel.
REDUCES RISK OF IRRITATION: Our sensitive shower gel for men is designed to protect your skin and help reduce the risk of irritation.
ENHANCES NATURAL HYDRATION: The formula in this men’s body wash is enriched with skin natural moisturisers to enhance your skin’s natural hydration, leaving it feeling healthy and protected.
6-IN-1 BENEFITS: Our sensitive shower gel has 6-in-1 uses. It moisturises and you can use it on your body and your face, to shampoo and condition your hair and for shaving.

RESPECTS SKIN: This dermatologically tested men’s body wash respects your skin’s natural pH and contains 0% sulphates*. It's also certified by the British Skin Foundation and has been developed with dermatologists. *Does not contain sulphate-based surfactants
description: Product Description Sanex Men Skin Health Sensitive Care Shower Gel protects skin & helps reduce the risk of irritation. The 6-in-1 sensitive shower gel has skin natural moisturisers to enhance skin’s natural hydration.
